## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Augment Code's product, target customers, and plan user interviews to gain deeper insights.](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Augment's key differentiators: context engine, proactive agent, competitive pricing](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Primary target: "sole coders" (50% of self-serve market), followed by "control coders" (15-20%)](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Largest untapped opportunity: experienced developers skeptical of AI in complex environments](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2541.0)
  - [Plan to conduct user interviews focusing on sole coders switching from Cursor to Augment](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2454.0)

## Topics

### Augment's Target Customers and Differentiators

  - [ICP: Companies with 100-1,000 engineers, using cloud deployment (AWS, Azure, GCP)](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Key features:](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [Context engine: Retains code structure/context better than competitors](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
      - [Proactive agent: Acts without explicit planning steps](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
      - [Competitive pricing: Previously unlimited usage for fixed fee](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Customer segments:](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
    1.  Sole coders (50% of self-serve): Optimize personal workflow, use multiple extensions
    2.  Control coders (15-20%): Manage entire repos, need deterministic outcomes
    3.  Super coders (2.5-5%): Highest spenders, treat AI like junior engineers

### Customer Acquisition Channels

  - [AI benchmarks (e.g., Sweetbench): Early differentiator in code completion](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Social promotion: Twitter, founder/CEO visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [VS Code extensions marketplace: Early visibility among alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Price point: Initially offered unlimited usage for fixed fee](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Word-of-mouth: Easier setup compared to competitors (e.g., Cursor)](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors: Cursor, Winsurf](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [Augment advantages:](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
      - [Better context retention across larger codebases](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
      - [Easier setup without extensive AI settings configuration](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2281.0)
      - [More deterministic outcomes due to context engine](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)

### Largest Untapped Market Opportunity

  - [Experienced developers (10+ years) skeptical of AI in complex environments](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2576.0)
  - [Concerns: Job security, code complexity, AI unpredictability, security flaws](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2584.0)
  - [Requires addressing compliance (e.g., SOC 2) and security concerns](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2598.0)

### User Interview Plans

  - [Focus on "sole coders" switching from Cursor to Augment](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2444.0)
  - [Use existing screener to identify target interviewees](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2435.0)
  - [Conduct 4-5 interviews per week, scheduled for Thursdays and Fridays](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2654.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Todd to send over user interview screener to George](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2710.0)
  - [George to review screener and provide any additional criteria](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2656.0)
  - [Schedule user interviews for Thursdays and Fridays](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2713.0)
  - [Conduct interviews to gain deeper insights into sole coders' switching moments and motivations](https://fathom.video/share/xkH3fM6YUs1yqpjygubCYDsp9gHX6HBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
